echo parameter `${1}` to stderr: set various environment variables. Like 28 of them.
remove contents from a chrooted directory. If CHROOTDIR exists return a 0; if it's mounted then unmount it. If FULLCLEAN is 'no' then chflags to ``noschg`` and delete the directory.
Mounts required device support optionally builds the system installs it into a chroot and ensures required directories exist.
Ensures a Git source tree exists and is up to date under a given destination directory. It clones the source tree if missing; switches to the desired branch; or pulls updates if it already exists.
